Bash(cat /Users/zengjinlong/.claude/projects/-Users-zengjinlong-Documents-work-ai-space-user-rewite/d9733847-294d-41f4-bcb7-2a082b0a78f1.jsonl | python3 -c "
import sys
import json

user_count = 0
for i, line in enumerate\(sys.stdin\):
    line = line.strip\(\)
    if not line:
        continue
    try:
        data = json.loads\(line\)
        entry_type = data.get\('type', 'unknown'\)
        if entry_type == 'user':
            user_count += 1
            content = data.get\('message', {}\).get\('content', ''\)
            is_meta = data.get\('isMeta', False\)
            
            # 检查内容类型
            if isinstance\(content, str\):
                preview = content[:100].replace\('\\n', '\\\\n'\)
            else:
                preview = str\(type\(content\)\)
            
            print\(f'{i}: user #{user_count}, isMeta={is_meta}, preview={preview}'\)
            
            if user_count >= 10:  # 只看前10条用户消息
                break
    except Exception as e:
        print\(f'{i}: error - {e}'\)
")
